backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video sharing platform with user profiles, video upload/metadata management, commenting system, subscriptions, and access control using authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (video upload, player, listing, authentication, sharing, comments, subscriptions, profiles) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for the video sharing platform.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for VideoHub application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, video player, upload, and profile pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
Comments section component displaying video comments with add comment form for authenticated users, showing author avatars, names, and timestamps with real-time updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, navigation, and footer that handles authentication, profile setup modal display, and routing to upload page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to set up their profile with name (required) and channel description (optional) fields.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Displays a grid of recommended or popular videos sorted by view count, excluding the current video if specified.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button component that copies the video URL to clipboard and shows a success toast notification.
Subscribe/unsubscribe button that shows subscriber count and handles channel subscription state, hidden for own channel.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: Card component displaying video thumbnail, title, view count, and upload time with hover effects and link to video page.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Custom video player with controls for play/pause, volume, seeking, fullscreen, and share functionality that tracks play events.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook for adding comments to videos that invalidates the comments query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend with window focus refetching enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile, returning null if no profile exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos for a specific channel identified by Principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches comments for a specific video by video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber Principals for a given channel.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: Query hook that fetches a user profile by Principal, returning null if user is undefined or profile doesn't exist.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single video's metadata by ID using the actor instance.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments a video's view count and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout with AuthClient, managing identity state and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile and invalidates the profile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: React Query mutation hook that subscribes to a channel by Principal and invalidates the subscribers query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file with metadata using ExternalBlob, supporting progress callbacks and invalidating the videos query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays a grid of all videos with loading skeletons and a recommended videos section when content is available.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays a user's profile with avatar, channel info, subscriber count, and a grid of their uploaded videos.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Form page for authenticated users to upload videos with title, description, and file selection, extracting video duration and showing upload progress.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Video player page displaying video content, uploader info, description, view count, upload date, subscribe button, comments section, and recommended videos.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Provides utility functions for formatting view counts (K/M notation), timestamps into relative time strings (e.g., '2 hours ago'), and video durations (HH:MM:SS format).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended border radius values, custom shadows including glow effects, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a YouTube-like video platform with implemented features including video upload, playback, authentication via Internet Identity, comments, subscriptions, recommendations, and user profiles.
